summary.summary: Modify TelemetryClient payload: the appName field assignment in Trio/Sources/Services/Telemetry/TelemetryClient.swift was changed from telemetryAppName to TelemetryClient.telemetryAppName (see diff:1d4dcf162b35, file:b5be52930d33, commit:30a195b2715f7da078676a87fa63be7ae8ad620e).
summary.userFacingImpact: This corrects a variable reference used when building the telemetry payload (pr:gordolio/Trio#1176, pr:nightscout/Trio#1176, diff:1d4dcf162b35). The supplied sources do not show tests or runtime behavior that demonstrate a specific user-visible effect, so the exact runtime/user-facing impact is unclear and human review is recommended (file:b5be52930d33, commit:30a195b2715f7da078676a87fa63be7ae8ad620e).
